case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. COMPETENT BUILDERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT COMPETENT BUILDERS, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
